'''jaloso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zelnik|zelnik]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-l-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zelnik|zelnik]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jaloso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæleseth|jæleseth]] || [[word:jælesej|jælesej]] || [[word:jælesesh|jælesesh]] || [[word:jælese|jælese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jalolosoth|jalolosoth]] || [[word:jalolosoj|jalolosoj]] || [[word:jalolososh|jalolososh]] || [[word:jaloloso|jaloloso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jalosoth|jalosoth]] || [[word:jalosoj|jalosoj]] || [[word:jalososh|jalososh]] || [[word:jaloso|jaloso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jalofsoth|jalofsoth]] || [[word:jalofsoj|jalofsoj]] || [[word:jalofsosh|jalofsosh]] || [[word:jalofsof|jalofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jalosotho|jalosotho]] || [[word:jalosojo|jalosojo]] || [[word:jalososho|jalososho]] || [[word:jalosoko|jalosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jalosoth|jalosoth]] || [[word:jalosoj|jalosoj]] || [[word:jalososh|jalososh]] || [[word:jaloso|jaloso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jalosothol|jalosothol]] || [[word:jalosojol|jalosojol]] || [[word:jalososhol|jalososhol]] || [[word:jalosokol|jalosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jalosothotho|jalosothotho]] || [[word:jalosojojo|jalosojojo]] || [[word:jalososhosho|jalososhosho]] || [[word:jalosoko|jalosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jalosothon|jalosothon]] || [[word:jalosojon|jalosojon]] || [[word:jalososhon|jalososhon]] || [[word:jalosokon|jalosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jalosothoro|jalosothoro]] || [[word:jalosojoro|jalosojoro]] || [[word:jalososhoro|jalososhoro]] || [[word:jalosokoro|jalosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
